name: stagecrew
description: stagecrew — agentic loop workflow. An autonomous multi-stage agent crew that specs, builds, tests, critiques and ships a GitHub issue. Spec-driven, never one-shot. Pure-reader: standards live in your repo's AGENTS.md, not in this plugin. Multi-type-system: code-loops + research-loops, dispatched per issue-label. Optional opt-in AGENTS.md fields: a component registry and a Playwright-driven visual reviewer gate for frontend issues.
